channel.title: Technology - Latest - Google News
channel.copyright: Copyright © 2026 Google. All rights reserved. This XML feed is made available solely for the purpose of rendering Google News results within a personal feed reader for personal, non-commercial use. Any other use of the feed is expressly prohibited. By accessing this feed or using these results in any manner whatsoever, you agree to be bound by the foregoing restrictions.

  2. Helldivers 2: The Exo Experts Warbond drops April 28  PlayStation.Blog

  5. Helldivers 2 finally buffs mechs with double durability, and in unrelated news, Arrowhead is selling new mechs for $10  Yahoo Tech

item.title: Alleged would-be Trump assassin once made an "atomic fighting game", which Steam have now yanked from sale - Rock Paper Shotgun
item.description:
1. Alleged would-be Trump assassin once made an "atomic fighting game", which Steam have now yanked from sale  Rock Paper Shotgun
  2. 'This Game is a Miss': Cole Allen's Indie Game 'Bohrdom' Goes Viral After Failed White House Assassination Plot  International Business Times UK

item.title: The Expanse RPG Is A Letdown As A Big Fan Of The Sci-Fi Show - Kotaku
item.description:
1. The Expanse RPG Is A Letdown As A Big Fan Of The Sci-Fi Show  Kotaku
  2. We went hands-on with 'The Expanse: Osiris Reborn', and it's a hard sci-fi 'Mass Effect' successor with show-stealing zero-G sections  Space
  3. The Expanse: Osiris Reborn plays like a Mass Effect-like sci-fi adventure in fine form, but its developer's use of AI raises some difficult questions  Eurogamer.net
  4. The Expanse: Osiris Reborn PS5 Hands-On Preview - Massive Mass Effect Vibes In The Best Way Possible  PlayStation Universe
  5. Do You Need to Watch The Expanse Before Osiris Reborn Comes Out?  GameRant
